channel.title: Ai in Gaming on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Ai in Gaming on MinWeb

item.title: Warhorse Studios Replaces Human Translator With AI to Save Costs
item.description: Warhorse Studios faces backlash after replacing human translators with AI despite record-breaking profits, sparking a debate on industry ethics and quality.

item.title: Crimson Desert Faces Backlash Over AI-Generated Art Errors
item.description: Pearl Abyss faces backlash as players discover AI-generated art errors in Crimson Desert, sparking concerns over marketing transparency and studio trust.
